HowItWorks.title: How Urban Wealth Works
HowItWorks.subtitle: We democratize access to institutional-grade European real estate. Start building your legacy in four simple steps.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Explore our curated selection of European investment properties. Our acquisitions team strictly vets every asset, providing full financial details, location insights, and independent valuations.
HowItWorks.step2Description: Select a property that fits your strategy. Use our investment calculator to project your ownership equity, est. annual yield, and potential appreciation before committing capital.
HowItWorks.step3Description: Receive your proportional share of rental income deposited directly to your account. Simultaneously benefit from long-term capital appreciation as property values rise.
HowItWorks.step4Description: Monitor your investments from an intuitive dashboard. Track real-time performance metrics, view comprehensive transaction histories, and reinvest accumulated dividends.
HowItWorks.faq1Question: What is fractional real estate investing?
HowItWorks.faq1Answer: Fractional investing allows you to purchase equity in a property alongside other investors, rather than funding the entire asset yourself. You receive proportional returns from rental income and property appreciation relative to your share.
HowItWorks.faq2Question: What is the minimum capital requirement?
HowItWorks.faq2Answer: You can begin investing with as little as €50. There is no maximum limit, although individual allocations are subject to the remaining funding capacity of each property.
HowItWorks.faq3Answer: Rental income dividends are distributed on a monthly basis directly to your platform wallet. Capital appreciation is realized either upon the strategic sale of the asset or through periodic equity refinancing.
HowItWorks.faq4Answer: We charge a transparent, one-time sourcing fee of 1.5% on initially invested capital. There are no hidden management or performance fees—what you see in the calculator is what you pay.
HowItWorks.faq5Question: What happens when an asset reaches its funding target?
HowItWorks.faq5Answer: The property status updates to 'Fully Funded' and the equity offering closes. Settlement occurs shortly after, and investors begin accruing rental yield. New vetted assets are listed regularly.
HowItWorks.ctaSubtitle: Create an account in minutes and access our exclusive portfolio.
